name: foc-bridge
description: HTTP bridge between Python inference service and Filecoin Onchain Cloud (Synapse SDK)
comment_overrides: B8/A9 dep-vuln remediation. tar bumped directly (^7.4.0 -> ^7.5.16) to clear the file-smuggling parser differential (GHSA-vmf3-w455-68vh). ws is pinned to a vulnerable 8.17.x transitively (via ethers); overridden to ^8.21.0 for the uninitialized-memory-disclosure fix (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx). The Dockerfile runs `npm install` (not `npm ci`), so the lockfile alone is not honored — these package.json changes are what actually take effect at image build.
